name: Flashcard Challenge
description: Multi-mode flashcard game with 3 sub-types: ImageToWord (show image, type word), ListeningWordToImage (hear word, click image), SentenceCompletion (fill in the blank).

slots.label: Game data JSON with sub_type and cards/items array

aiInstructions: Generate a JSON object with sub_type and content. For ImageToWord: { sub_type: 'ImageToWord', cards: [{ id: 1, image_data: '<base64>', answer: 'cat' }] }. For SentenceCompletion: { sub_type: 'SentenceCompletion', cards: [{ id: 1, sentence_template: 'The ____ is red.', missing_word: 'apple', options: ['apple', 'car', 'dog'] }] }. Create 5-10 items at the student's level.
